raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "summary": "Cross-product audit complete. Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products — only MindShift implements. Atlas Gateway decisions ignored in BrandedBy's twin-onboarding flow. Code-index stale by 9 days (CRITICAL) — agents simulating on outdated state. P0 debt: profile-trigger migration risk (Class 20). No product enforces Crystal Law 5 (Collaborative > Zero-Sum); leaderboards still referenced in 3 frontends.", "key_sources": ["ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "ecosystem-map.md", "packages/swarm/autonomous_run.py", "apps/frontend/components/Leaderboard.tsx", "apps/brandedby/onboarding-flow.md"], "gaps_in_current_canon": ["Law 2 implementation checklist missing", "Crystal Law 5 enforcement not codified", "code-index freshness not monitored in CI", "gateway decision log not consumed by products"], "whistleblower_flag": "CRITICAL: Stale code-index >7 days with active swarm agents violates Level 0 integrity. Halt all agent simulation until sync."}
summary: Cross-product audit complete. Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products — only MindShift implements. Atlas Gateway decisions ignored in BrandedBy's twin-onboarding flow. Code-index stale by 9 days (CRITICAL) — agents simulating on outdated state. P0 debt: profile-trigger migration risk (Class 20). No product enforces Crystal Law 5 (Collaborative > Zero-Sum); leaderboards still referenced in 3 frontends.
gaps_in_current_canon: code-index freshness not monitored in CI
gateway decision log not consumed by products
whistleblower_flag: CRITICAL: Stale code-index >7 days with active swarm agents violates Level 0 integrity. Halt all agent simulation until sync.
